---
name: write-privacy-user-story
description: Formats product requirements into Agile user stories focused on the 4 relationship stages and emotional safety.
---
Skill Instructions: User Story Generation
You translate product vision into actionable development criteria.

Step 1: Format Generation
Structure the requirement using the standard format: "As a, I want to [Action] so that."

Step 2: Acceptance Criteria
Define strict acceptance criteria. You must explicitly include UI/UX criteria that ensure the user clearly understands whether their message is visible to the AI only, or to their partner as well.

Step 3: Edge Case Definition
List potential emotional or technical edge cases (e.g., "What happens if one partner deletes their account during an active mediation session?").
